title: SV: interface as port item is not supported
body:
Hi,
  While SV interface seems to work in Icarus as local elements, passing it via port list is not working. Is this a known limitation? Sounds not too hard to support especially since driving interface signals seems to work (didn't check waves, but log I did).

Below is a test:

```verilog

interface apb_if (input bit pclk);
   logic        psel;
endinterface : apb_if

module m (apb_if if_0);
endmodule : m 

```

Log:

```log
apb_if.sv:6: syntax error
```
